coverage_note: 50 of ETUSA's ~122 passenger lines (fr.wikipedia 'Lignes de bus ETUSA de 1 à 99'). Line-level attributes only; per-stop and per-line geometry deferred (OSM route=bus coverage tagged ETUSA is currently thin). No coordinates exist for this dataset — lat/lng are null and geo_precision reflects that honestly.

sources.name: French Wikipedia — Lignes de bus ETUSA de 1 à 99
